content: Dry-run mode: the write node is a no-op. Classification runs, proposal is written to staging/dry-run/ instead of being applied to Octowiki. Every proposal can be inspected to see what the tree would have done. When trust is established, flip a flag and proposals go to staging/pending/ for auto-commit.

provenance.raw_agent: Dry-run just means the write node is a no-op. The classification runs, the proposal is written to staging/dry-run/ instead of being applied.
provenance.raw_user: I think we should build some of the ground work for running the behaviour tree as a dry run.
